# metalalchemistspex.github.io

## 🎣 Smishi — Ne Nasedaj

SMS phishing detector for Serbian, Bosnian, Croatian & Montenegrin. Built for the Build Small Hackathon, June 2026.

This site hosts a short blog (retro 90s style) covering the project: the problem (smishing up 1,300% in Serbia), the architecture (TF-IDF + fine-tuned BERTić ensemble, 110M parameters, 96.96% accuracy), and results (105-case test set, 93.3% accuracy).

🔗 **Links**
- [Live demo (HF Space)](https://huggingface.co/spaces/build-small-hackathon/ne-nasedaj-sms-phishing)
- [Model card](https://huggingface.co/ravi2505/ne-nasedaj-sms-phishing)
- [Demo video (Loom)](https://www.loom.com/share/33f87e7836244b28ae054a346ce8ffff)
